summary: A clip of a State of the Union address from The White House. The President stands at the rostrum in the House chamber speaking into microphones, with two seated officials behind him. The footage cuts to the gallery where a child is greeted amid a standing, applauding audience. A lower-third banner reads TEXT 'SOTU' TO 45470 FOR UPDATES.

script.scene: The President speaks at the rostrum in the House chamber; banner reads TEXT 'SOTU' TO 45470 FOR UPDATES.
In the gallery, a child is greeted amid a standing, applauding audience.
The President continues the address at the rostrum.

notable_text: STATE OF THE UNION; TEXT 'SOTU' TO 45470 FOR UPDATES; The White House
